question: In Wix, what information must be entered in the service management pop-up to define a new service?
answer: Enter the service name in the 'Name Your Service' text field, select a category from the adjacent dropdown menu, and input the description in the service details box.
keypoints: The user types 'Tour around the City' into the text field labeled 'Name Your Service'.
The user selects the 'Travel' category from the dropdown menu next to the service name.
The user enters 'See the city view.' into the description box under the service details.

question: In Wix, how do you configure operational details for a new service in the management pop-up?
answer: Set the total price in the pricing section, adjust the maximum participants in the participants section, and select operating days in the scheduling section.
keypoints: The user sets the total price to '100 USD' in the pricing section.
The user adjusts the maximum number of participants to '50' in the participants section.
The user selects the days of operation as Monday through Sunday in the scheduling section.

question: In Wix, how do you apply a specific design layout to a service list section?
answer: In the left-side panel under 'Section Design', select a design layout by clicking a preview thumbnail to apply it to the service list section.
keypoints: In the left-side panel under 'Section Design,' the user selects a design layout for the service list by clicking on one of the preview thumbnails.
The selected design layout is applied to the service list section, displaying three placeholder services with images and text fields labeled 'Service Name.'
